title: celtis sinensis f. rotundata
intro: Celtis sinensis f. rotundata, also known as the Chinese Pear Tree, is a deciduous tree native to China, characterized by its small, round fruits and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Celtis sinensis f. rotundata include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory issues, as well as promoting digestion and alleviating stress. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, with some commercial products also available in capsule or tablet form.
